message:
✨ Add LG WebOS TV casting via SSAP WebSocket protocol (#37)

- Add lg_webos_client.dart: WebSocket SSAP client for LG WebOS TVs
  (pairing, playMedia, pause, play, stop, volume, mute)
- Cast dialog: 'Add by IP' button for manual device entry
  (LG WebOS TVs don't respond to DLNA/SSDP discovery reliably)
- Cast service: handle both 'webos' and 'dlna' device types for
  castTo, stopCasting, pause, resume, setVolume
- Probe port 3000 to detect WebOS TVs, save pairing key for reuse
- TV shows pairing prompt on first connection

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
